nasb.text: For such men are false apostles, deceitful workers, disguising themselves as apostles of Christ.

esv.text: For such men are false apostles, deceitful workmen, disguising themselves as apostles of Christ.

cnv.text: 這樣的人是假使徒，是詭詐的工人，裝成基督的使徒。

ccb.text: 其实这些人是假使徒，为人诡诈，冒充基督的使徒。

csbs.text: 因为这样的人是假使徒，是诡诈的工人，他们装做基督的使徒。
